entries.user_summary: A core invariant test failed; on-disk semantics may diverge from kernel ext4/btrfs.
entries.technical_cause: Workspace-level cargo test reported one or more failing unit assertions in ffs-core, ffs-mvcc, or ffs-journal.
entries.immediate_action: Stop using this build for any read-write workload. Rebuild from the previous known-good tag and capture the failing test output.

entries.user_summary: Mounted smoke could not run because the host lacks /dev/fuse, sudo, or fuser binaries.
entries.technical_cause: FUSE capability probe reported missing kernel module, missing helper binary, or unprivileged user namespace constraints.
entries.immediate_action: Re-run on a host with fuser >= 0.16 and /dev/fuse available, or treat the mounted lane as authoritatively unavailable for this build.
entries.reproduction_command: rch exec -- cargo run -p ffs-harness -- fuse-capability-probe --json

entries.user_summary: mknod for block/char devices is not supported and was rejected before any disk state changed.
entries.technical_cause: FUSE backend declines mknod for special files outside the V1 envelope to preserve no-partial-mutation guarantees.
entries.immediate_action: Use a regular file or a kernel-mounted filesystem if device nodes are required; otherwise treat the rejection as the documented contract.

entries.user_summary: Proof bundle artifact is older than the freshness TTL; readiness verdict cannot be trusted.
entries.technical_cause: Bundle generated_at exceeds the configured TTL or its source artifacts have changed hashes since generation.
entries.immediate_action: Regenerate the proof bundle and rerun the release-gate evaluator before publishing readiness claims.
entries.reproduction_command: rch exec -- cargo run -p ffs-harness -- build-operator-proof-bundle --out artifacts/proof-bundle/latest.json

entries.user_summary: FrankenFS refused to operate on a hostile image to protect the host and any pre-existing data.
entries.technical_cause: Image header, journal, or extent tree triggered the adversarial threat-model gate (e.g. impossible block counts, malformed checksums, suspicious xattr name length).
entries.immediate_action: Do not retry; capture the refusal artifact and route the image through the security review pipeline before any further use.
entries.reproduction_command: rch exec -- cargo run -p ffs-harness -- validate-adversarial-threat-model --image <path>

entries.user_summary: Automatic repair refused to mutate user data because the confidence gate failed.
entries.technical_cause: Repair confidence lab thresholds (symbol coverage, ledger integrity, residual risk) did not meet the mutation_safety_gate, so the repair plan stopped at detection-only.
entries.immediate_action: Capture the detection report, take a manual backup before any further attempts, and route the image to the repair-confidence calibration corpus.
entries.reproduction_command: rch exec -- cargo run -p ffs-harness -- run-repair-confidence-lab --image <path> --dry-run

entries.user_summary: Mounted smoke passed under an experimental feature flag; production claims must remain qualified.
entries.technical_cause: Lane succeeded only with feature-state experimental enabled; full validation requires authoritative lane runs and broader xfstests coverage.
entries.immediate_action: Continue using only as experimental; record the caveat in any README/FEATURE_PARITY status update derived from this run.
